validation_gates.reason: Repository, pinned main commit, same-path target, prior blob, two-file scope, non-goals, review branch, and no-merge boundary were resolved before mutation.
No overlapping open pull request or matching examples modernization branch surfaced; main and the target blob were rechecked before branch creation.

The existing examples root README was updated in place. The generated receipt uses the existing data/receipts/generated process-memory lane. No root, example lane, authority home, lifecycle phase, release path, or public route was created.

The complete v0.2.0 target was read; its purpose, child inventory, operational crosswalk, accepted material, exclusions, marker JSON, guardrails, lifecycle diagram, validation, review, evidence, and stable fragments were preserved or strengthened.
The first twelve H2 sections exactly match Directory Rules section 15: Purpose through Last reviewed.
Eight direct child README lanes and three concrete Markdown walkthroughs were verified at the pinned revision without treating static files as runnable, tested, released, or operational.

The final README is UTF-8 with LF endings and a final newline; KFM metadata parses; one H1, thirty-eight headings without hierarchy jumps, five language-tagged fence pairs, balanced HTML, one Mermaid flowchart, three alerts, eighteen tables, and seven static badges passed deterministic source validation.

Fifteen explicit anchors are unique, all twelve legacy fragments are retained, forty-seven internal references resolve, and introduced repository-relative targets passed exact path checks. The repository link-check workflow remains a hold and is not claimed as execution.
No private-key, common token, bearer credential, or high-precision coordinate pattern was introduced; sensitive-example behavior remains synthetic and fail-closed.

GitHub returned blob d3fbce80c82106935288d59a708bbb1a0118591e on commit 17b162ef3af7bad8c85f31453710292fbff6a88c, matching the locally recomputed Git blob; artifact SHA-256 is 8c306a4d3d48f7da6925d2adc6eb007a36ec8e35ab11259e8c9ab51d11ec9d3a.
Documentation/provenance-only change; no example runner, code, dependency, fixture, validator, runtime, source, lifecycle, release, or public behavior changed.
Pull-request workflows were pending at receipt emission time. No CI success, human approval, merge readiness, release, or publication claim is made by this receipt.
Human review remains pending and separate from generation, validation, commit, merge, release, and publication.
